summary: Iteration 69: Emergent-Only Auth Migration Complete. All 12 test scenarios PASSED. Verified the architectural change from Lovable+Emergent to Emergent-only authentication. All redirects now stay within the Emergent domain (https://order-management-77.preview.emergentagent.com). No references to spetapp.com or lovable.app found in frontend code.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Emergent-only auth migration verified. All auth routes (/login, /signup, /onboarding, /venue/home, /ceo) are now handled within Emergent domain. ProtectedRoute.js uses React Router <Navigate to='/login'> component. logout.js redirects to '/login' (relative path). No REACT_APP_LOVABLE_LOGIN_URL in .env. No window.location.href to external domains. The /auth/handoff route has been removed.

Scenario 1: Root redirect.details: Visit / → redirects to /login on same Emergent domain

Scenario 2: Protected /venue/home redire.details: Visit /venue/home without auth → redirects to /login on same domain

Scenario 3: Protected /ceo redirect.details: Visit /ceo without auth → redirects to /login on same domain

Scenario 4: Login page form.details: Login form renders with email input, password input, Sign in button, Sign up link

Scenario 5: Regular user login.details: Login as teste@teste.com → redirects to /venue/home with Modules dropdown visible

Scenario 6: TAP module access.details: Click TAP in Modules dropdown → /tap page loads with categories (Beers, Cocktails, etc.)

Scenario 7: VenueHome logout.details: Click logout button (data-testid='logout-btn') → redirects to /login ON SAME EMERGENT DOMAIN

Scenario 8: CEO login.details: Login as garcia.rapha2@gmail.com → redirects to /ceo with Executive Overview dashboard

Scenario 9: CEO logout.details: Click logout from CEO dashboard → redirects to /login ON SAME EMERGENT DOMAIN

Scenario 10: Signup page form.details: Signup form renders with name, email, password inputs, plan selection, Create Account button, Login link

Scenario 11: Incomplete onboarding user.details: Login as teste1@teste.com → redirects to /onboarding ('Welcome to SPET' page)

Scenario 12: No external redirect refere.details: No references to spetapp.com/login or lovable.app found in frontend code. All window.location.href calls use relative '/login' path or legitimate checkout URLs

architecture_verification.ProtectedRoute.js: Uses <Navigate to='/login'> React Router component (not window.location.href)
architecture_verification.logout.js: Redirects to '/login' (relative path on same domain)
architecture_verification..env: No REACT_APP_LOVABLE_LOGIN_URL - only REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL pointing to Emergent domain
